buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002280] transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium
buttons.danger: bg-red-500 text-white hover:bg-red-600 transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-bold
buttons.kill_switch: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 transition-colors rounded-md px-8 py-4 font-black uppercase tracking-wider text-xl shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(239,68,68,0.5)] border-2 border-red-800
buttons.outline: border border-slate-300 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2

badges.demo: bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 border border-blue-200 px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase
badges.real: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 border border-amber-200 px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase

design_rules.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards. Use tinted greys (slate). High contrast for data visibility.
design_rules.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for dense data clarity.
design_rules.motion: Minimal animations. Fast transitions (150ms) for professional feel. No bouncy effects.
design_rules.alignment: Left-align dense data and tables. Right-align numeric values in tables.

data_test_ids_convention: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., login-form-submit-button, kill-switch-button, demo-real-toggle

image_urls.description: Abstract white grid for authentication screen background
Professional profile picture for user account menu
Financial chart background for empty states or marketing banners

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Recharts for performance metrics and equity curve: yarn add recharts
Ensure the Demo/Real mode toggle explicitly requires manual validation (e.g., a Dialog confirmation) before switching to Real mode.
The Kill Switch MUST be the most prominent button on the dashboard. Use the specific kill_switch button styles provided.
All currency values must be formatted clearly (e.g., in EUR/USD) with correct decimal alignment in tables.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout (Control Room Grid). Use Shadcn strictly for functional UI (Dialog, Select, Table, Tabs).
Implement real-time visual feedback for open positions (green for profit, red for loss).
Every interactive element MUST have a data-testid attribute.
pages_and_features: Auth Screen: Login/Register (Email/Password) with abstract background.
Dashboard: Real-time balance, P&L, Equity Curve, Open Positions preview.
Bot Control Panel: ON/OFF toggle, Kill Switch (Red, massive), Demo/Real switcher with Validation Dialog.
Strategies Screen: Selectable list (Scalping RSI, Trend EMA/MACD, Mean-Reversion Bollinger, Multi-indicators).
Risk Settings: Forms for Stop Loss, Take Profit, Daily Drawdown, Position Sizing, Risk/Reward.
Trade History: Table with filters and CSV/JSON export buttons.
Performance Metrics: Winrate, Drawdown, Profit Factor, Expectancy, Sharpe Ratio with charts.
Audit Logs: List of bot decisions and entry/exit reasons.
Cost Tracker: Module to add/track/analyze VPS, API, data, and maintenance expenses.
MT5 Connection Settings: Encrypted form for credentials.
Backtesting Interface: Historical data testing setup.
